top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says sovereign AI is Nvidia's powerful new growth driver
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said Nvidia's growing sovereign AI business could help reduce the company's dependence on hyperscalers.

top_signals.title: Armenia’s pro-Europe party wins election despite Russia-linked disinformation
top_signals.summary: Pashinyan's Civil Contract party won nearly 50% of Sunday's vote, defeating the pro-Russian Strong Armenia party led by Russian-Armenian billionaire Samvel Karapetyan, which received around 23% of the vote.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: French Army has recruitment surplus but lacks equipment, deputy chief says
top_signals.summary: “This year, we’re already slowing down recruitment because not only are we recruiting better, but we’re retaining people better," a service leader said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Nova Scotia’s mining revival deserves a second look
top_signals.summary: Policy reforms, faster permitting and new projects are reshaping Nova Scotia's mining sector and economic outlook.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
